item.title: Billionaire Lex Wexner tells US lawmakers he was 'naive' and 'conned' by Epstein
item.description: Testifying before Congress, the former CEO of Victoria's Secret lingerie brand accused Epstein of stealing "vast sums" of money from his family.

item.title: Do not give away Diego Garcia, Trump tells UK in fresh attack on Chagos deal
item.description: The president's comments come just a day after the US gave its official backing to the UK's Chagos deal.

item.title: Bone cement shortage likely to lead to joint surgery delays, NHS warns
item.description: Around 1,000 operations a week rely on the product as patients are warned delays are inevitable.

item.title: GB curlers emerge from epic day with medal hopes revived
item.description: Team GB's Winter Olympics curling medal hopes in both the men's and women's events are somehow still alive after a day of epic drama in Cortina.

item.title: GB curlers emerge from epic day with medal hopes revived
item.description: Team GB's Winter Olympics curling medal hopes in both the men's and women's events are somehow still alive after a day of epic drama in Cortina.
